title: BUG-0025 Firefly Stromkosten mirror lag

BX.primary_verify: Backdated imports ingest on manual Full or Sync Status callout + runbook explain DEC-0002 overlap + cursor reset — not silent skip

last_run unchanged — latest run of any kind

tasks.title: Runbook § backdated Firefly imports + cursor reset
tests: Symptom: category trend missing months after backdated import
Cause: DEC-0002 transaction-date start filter
Fix ≤365d: Sync now on /sync (manual Full)
Fix >365d: DELETE FROM sync_cursors WHERE entity_type = transactions
Safety: upsert by Firefly id — no duplicate rows

Same fixture + trigger=manual post-fix — row in transactions mirror
